moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with the final between Spain and Argentina, following England's third-place play-off match on Saturday.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain face Argentina in the World Cup Final on Sunday. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: England's Battle
angles.copy: England might not be in the final, but they're still battling for bronze in the third-place play-off against France on Saturday. Can they finish strong?

moments.title: The Open Championship Live
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: Golf's final major of the year is LIVE! The Open Championship is happening now at Royal Birkdale. Who will claim the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Hero Watch
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Birkdale this weekend as The Open Championship takes over. Is there a local hero ready to make their mark?

moments.title: Beat-Herder Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Beat-Herder Festival, celebrating diverse music genres and immersive experiences, takes place in Lancashire from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Beat-Herder Festival is officially ON! Kicking off today in Lancashire with four days of diverse music, art, and good vibes. Who's there?

angles.name: Lancashire Party
angles.copy: Lancashire is buzzing! Beat-Herder Festival brings its unique blend of music and art to the region this weekend. Get ready to lose yourself!

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a music and arts event with over 130 acts, is happening in the Welsh countryside from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is bringing the music and arts to the beautiful Welsh countryside this weekend! Who's heading down?

angles.name: Music & Arts in Wales
angles.copy: Over 130 acts across 6 stages! Big Love Festival has kicked off, offering a fantastic weekend of music, circus, and family fun in Wales.

moments.title: Maid Of Stone Festival Rocks Kent
moments.blurb: The Maid Of Stone Festival, an independent rock music festival, takes place in Kent from July 17-19, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Weekend
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans! Maid Of Stone Festival kicks off tomorrow in Kent for a weekend of live bands and grassroots community vibes. Who's in?

angles.name: Kent Rockers
angles.copy: Kent is about to get loud! Maid Of Stone Festival brings independent rock to the county this weekend. Get ready to headbang!

moments.title: Bruno Mars at Wembley
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars brings 'The Romantic Tour' to Wembley Stadium in London for two nights, July 18-19, 2026.

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Bruno Mars takes over Wembley Stadium this weekend for 'The Romantic Tour'. Two nights of pure gold!

angles.name: Uptown Funk Live
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is bringing the funk to Wembley Stadium for two massive nights starting Saturday! Who's got tickets?

moments.title: En Vogue Live in London
moments.blurb: R&B legends En Vogue are performing at O2 Forum Kentish Town in London on July 22-23, 2026.

angles.name: Funky Divas
angles.copy: Don't miss En Vogue live in London next week! The R&B icons are bringing their hits to O2 Forum Kentish Town. Get your tickets!

angles.name: London R&B
angles.copy: Still 'Free Your Mind'? En Vogue are in London next Wednesday and Thursday! A chance to see the legends live.

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever on Netflix
moments.blurb: The final season/film of the popular series 'Heartstopper Forever' premieres globally on Netflix tomorrow, July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Heartstopper Returns
angles.copy: Get ready, Heartstopper fans! The final chapter, 'Heartstopper Forever', drops on Netflix tomorrow. Are you prepared for the feels?

angles.name: Netflix Binge
angles.copy: Your weekend binge is sorted! 'Heartstopper Forever' premieres on Netflix Friday. Who's staying up late to watch?

moments.title: Ann Droid Debuts on BBC One
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', premiering on BBC One tomorrow, July 17, 2026.

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back with a brand new comedy, 'Ann Droid', on BBC One tomorrow! Expect witty observations and an unlikely friendship.

angles.name: TV Must-Watch
angles.copy: Fancy a laugh? The highly anticipated comedy 'Ann Droid' starring Diane Morgan premieres on BBC One Friday. Add it to your watchlist!

moments.title: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer for The Police, turns 74 today, July 16, 2026. He was born in 1952.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland! The legendary drummer of The Police still bringing the rhythm.

angles.name: Police Beat
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to The Police's very own Stewart Copeland, turning 74 today! What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Geezer Butler, the iconic bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, July 17, 2026. He was born in 1949.

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Black Sabbath's legendary bassist Geezer Butler turns 77! Wishing a very happy birthday to a true metal icon.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the incredible Geezer Butler! The man behind so many iconic Black Sabbath lyrics. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 79th to Brian May
moments.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 19, 2026. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Queen Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen legend celebrates on Saturday. What's your favourite guitar solo?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, this Saturday! Still rocking the world.

moments.title: Happy 70th to Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band Sex Pistols, turns 70 on Sunday, July 20, 2026. He was born in 1956.

angles.name: Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the legendary drummer of the Sex Pistols, this Sunday! A true punk pioneer.

angles.name: Anarchy in the UK
angles.copy: Wishing a loud 70th birthday to Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook on Sunday! Still influencing generations of rock.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 21, 2026. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Don Henley! The voice and rhythm behind so many Eagles classics. Celebrate with his greatest hits!

angles.name: Hotel California Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley of the Eagles on Monday! What's your favourite song featuring his distinctive vocals?

moments.title: Happy 61st to Slash
moments.blurb: Slash, the legendary lead guitarist of Guns N' Roses, turns 61 on Wednesday, July 23, 2026. He was born in 1965.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! The Guns N' Roses guitar legend celebrates on Wednesday. What's your favourite GNR riff?

angles.name: Sweet Child O' Mine
angles.copy: Wishing a huge 61st birthday to the iconic Slash next Wednesday! Still shredding and inspiring generations.

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are breaking up for summer holidays this week, with dates varying by region but broadly falling between early and mid-July.

angles.name: Schools Out!
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are officially underway for many across the UK! Wishing everyone a fantastic break. What are your plans?

angles.name: Summer Fun Begins
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! Summer holidays are kicking off for schools nationwide. Bring on the sunshine and fun!

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 40 is refreshed weekly, reflecting the most popular tracks in the UK right now.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's hitting #1 on the Official Singles Chart this week? Tune in to Nation Hits to hear the biggest tracks right now!

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: The battle for the top spot is always fierce! Who do you think deserves to be number one on the UK Singles Chart this week?
